pkgmetadata.longdescription: rinoh-typeface-texgyrepagellaThis package provides the TeX Gyre Pagella_ typeface for use with rinohtype_.TeX Gyre Pagella is based on URW Palladio L and can be used as a replacementfor Palatino... _TeX Gyre Pagella httpwww.gust.org.plprojectse-foundrytex-gyrepagella.. _rinohtype httpsgithub.combrechtmrinohtypereadme
